channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Government Mobilizes to Reopen Roads and Assist Communities Affected by Mayon Volcano
item.description: President Ferdinand 'Bongbong' Marcos Jr. stated on Monday that the government is actively working to reopen all roads and thoroughfares affected by the unrest of Mayon Volcano. This effort aims to en...

item.title: Sammyro and Arap Uria Get Unique Access to Chelsea's Training Camp, Meet First-Team Players
item.description: Content creators Sammyro and Arap Uria had the opportunity of a lifetime when they visited Chelsea's Cobham training ground. The duo, known for their passion for English football and strong support fo...

item.title: Rudy Giuliani Hospitalized in Critical but Stable Condition
item.description: Former New York Mayor Rudy Giuliani, widely known as 'America's Mayor' for his leadership during the 9/11 attacks, has been hospitalized and is in critical but stable condition, according to his spoke...

item.title: TK Nciza seeks R5m in defamation lawsuit over Zahara’s death
item.description: The legal battle between former ANC Gauteng secretary Thembinkosi 'TK' Nciza and arts activist Bandile Magibili has intensified. Nciza is seeking a default judgment in a defamation claim against Magib...

item.title: Residents of FCT's Wadada Extension Displaced as Erosion Worsens
item.description: As the rainy season intensifies, residents of Wadada Extension in Abaji Area Council, Federal Capital Territory (FCT), are being forced to leave their homes due to the increasing damage caused by gull...

item.title: London sees first £10 pint amid rising beer prices
item.description: For the first time, the price of a pint in London has surpassed £10, reflecting a broader trend of increasing beer costs across the capital. Premium establishments, particularly in areas like Mayfair,...

item.title: eThekwini council rejects R3.9 billion vehicle upgrade over mismanagement concerns
item.description: During a council meeting on Thursday, eThekwini Municipality’s request for R3.9 billion to upgrade its ageing vehicle fleet was narrowly rejected, with 77 councillors voting against and 76 in favour. ...

item.title: Pakistan Faces Economic Strain Amid High Interest Rates and Global Shocks
item.description: The State Bank of Pakistan has increased the policy rate by 100 basis points to 11.5 percent, clearly signalling that stability is being prioritised over economic growth. With inflation hitting double...

item.title: Australia and Japan navigate strategic independence while maintaining US alliance
item.description: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s visit to Australia comes at a time of heightened geopolitical uncertainty, triggered by US-Israel actions against Iran and the closure of the Strait of Hormuz,...

item.title: West Bengal Assembly Election 2026 counting begins amid TMC-BJP contest
item.description: The article covers the start of counting for the West Bengal Assembly Election 2026, with the Trinamool Congress aiming for a fourth straight term and the BJP seeking to make a breakthrough in the sta...

item.title: ASEAN Newsrooms Collaborate to Address Challenges in Journalism Amid AI Rise
item.description: A coalition of independent newsrooms across Southeast Asia has launched a new podcast series, 'Good As News,' to tackle pressing issues facing journalism in the digital era. The pilot episode, 'The Hi...

item.title: Innovative Lighting System Helps Protect Lions and Maasai Livestock
item.description: On the dry plains near Amboseli National Park, Maasai families have long faced the challenge of lions attacking their livestock at night. For generations, this conflict has led to losses on both sides...

item.title: Ouaddou emphasises rest to prepare Orlando Pirates for Premiership run-in
item.description: Orlando Pirates FC head coach Abdeslam Ouaddou believes the recent break from competitive fixtures will be crucial for his squad as they approach the final stretch of the Betway Premiership title race...

item.title: Fuel Price Updates and Trends in Metro Manila for May 4, 2026
item.description: MANILA, Philippines — After a period of fuel price rollbacks in late April, early May projections indicate that pump prices are expected to increase again, presenting a more uneven and volatile trend....

item.title: Father Allegedly Kills Baby After Doubts About Paternity in Arusha
item.description: A tragic incident has shaken a family in Sinoni, Arusha, Tanzania, where an eight-month-old baby, Sahili Salmin, was allegedly killed by his 29-year-old father, Salmin Rajabu. Reports say that Rajabu,...

item.title: Iheanacho’s late goal gives Celtic 2-1 win over Hibernian in tight title race
item.description: Super Eagles striker Kelechi Iheanacho come through with one very important goal as Celtic beat Hibernian 2-1 in a tight Scottish Premiership match. The win keep Celtic strongly inside the title race,...

item.title: Election Commission Issues Clarification on VVPAT Slip Retrieval Ahead of Bengal Vote Counting
item.description: Just hours before the counting of votes in West Bengal, the Election Commission issued a clarification regarding the recovery of VVPAT slips. VVPAT, or Voter Verifiable Paper Audit Trail, is an import...

item.title: The Economic and Spatial Legacy of Apartheid: Understanding South Africa's Persistent Poverty Clusters
item.description: In this opinion piece, Pali Lehohla discusses the long-lasting economic and spatial impacts of apartheid in South Africa. He explains how the geography of apartheid, designed to enforce racial separat...

item.title: Cosatu reports positive turnout at May Day rallies despite challenges
item.description: The Congress of South African Trade Unions (Cosatu) has described its nationwide May Day rallies as a success, despite poor weather and reports suggesting lower-than-expected attendance. The main rall...

item.title: Raptors fall to Cavaliers in Game 7 after decisive third quarter collapse
item.description: The Toronto Raptors were eliminated from the NBA playoffs following a 114-102 loss to the Cleveland Cavaliers in Game 7 of their first-round series. Cleveland’s Jarrett Allen delivered a dominant perf...
